name: Nutty Coleslaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine shredded cabbage, chopped green onions, chopped celery, and roasted peanuts in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together the sugar, seasoned salt, red wine vinegar, and Italian dressing until well combined.
3. Pour the blended mixture over the cabbage, green onions, celery, and peanuts.
4. Toss everything together well to ensure even coating.
